## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include scenario YAML examples if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references (papers, tools, benchmarks), or screenshots.
